title: Hybrid Search with Amazon Bedrock and Atlas
description:
The Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base integration with MongoDB Atlas
supports How to Perform Hybrid Search.
Hybrid search combines MongoDB Vector Search and MongoDB Search (full-text search) to
help improve the relevancy of your search results.

children.text: Step 1: Create the MongoDB Vector Search index.

headings.text: Configure Hybrid Search for your Knowledge Base

children.text: Step 1: Navigate to Amazon Bedrock management console.
Step 2: Update your knowledge base configuration.
Step 3: Enable hybrid search for your knowledge base.
Step 1: Specify the  index in your knowledge base configuration.
Step 2: Specify the search type in your knowledge base configuration.
